overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City at night. The journey traverses elevated rooftops, neon-lit commercial walkways, and narrow atmospheric alleys, encountering NPCs and descending stairways through the cyberpunk urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated rooftop walkway with highway overlook

events.description: emerges from narrow corridor onto open rooftop with view of highway overpass
slows slightly while approaching the railing overlooking the highway below

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated walkway toward the edge overlooking the highway

entered.detail: metal and concrete safety railing along the walkway edge
elevated highway structure with moving vehicle lights visible in the distance
tall pole lights illuminating the highway below
concrete seating benches arranged along the rooftop perimeter
rectangular concrete planters with small vegetation

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a narrow elevated walkway at night, opening up to a rooftop overlook. The camera moves forward revealing a highway overpass in the distance with sparse traffic moving below. The environment features concrete railings and benches with teal-green neon lighting typical of the cyberpunk setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial walkway with vending machines and neon advertisements

events.description: turns left to follow the path along the large concrete wall
passes from open rooftop into corridor lined with illuminated vending machines

agents.ego_description: turning left and continuing along the walkway past seated NPCs and approaching vending machines

notable_agents.action: two individuals sitting on a bench facing the wall

entered.detail: tall beige concrete barrier wall running along the right side of the path
row of illuminated automated vending machines with colorful advertisements
bright neon commercial signage above the vending machines

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left along a walkway bordered by a large concrete wall on the right. Two NPCs sit on benches to the left. The path leads past brightly lit vending machines and neon signs, transitioning from the open highway view to a more enclosed commercial corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alleyway between buildings approaching stair descent

events.description: approaches stairway descent with metal shutter doors and accumulated trash

agents.ego_description: continuing past vending machines toward a darker alley entrance with stairs leading down

entered.detail: closed corrugated metal roll-up door of a shop front
descending stairway leading down to lower level
accumulated garbage bags and debris near the shutter door
high-rise building with illuminated windows rising in the distance

segments.scene_description: Walking deeper into the narrow corridor, the camera passes the last of the vending machines and approaches a stairway descent. Metal shutter doors and trash piles line the left side while a tall building looms ahead. The lighting becomes darker and more atmospheric.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower level alley with metal shutters and stair access

events.description: encounters three NPCs, one taking a photograph or scanning another against the wall
descends stairs into narrower passage with red ambient lighting

agents.ego_description: walking down stairs past a group of NPCs taking photos, then continuing descent into a red-lit alley

notable_agents.action: three individuals, one taking a photo of another posing against the shutter door

entered.detail: tall concrete walls enclosing a tight passage
standing water and wet surfaces reflecting the ambient light
elevated bridge or walkway connecting buildings overhead
red glowing light sources illuminating the alley ahead

segments.scene_description: Descending the stairs, the camera passes three NPCs engaged in a photo-taking interaction against a shutter door. The environment transitions to a narrow, wet alley with red neon lighting. An overhead walkway bridges the gap between buildings as the descent continues deeper into the urban canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep urban alley with water runoff and stair access to building entrance

events.description: enters deepest section of alley with water stream running down the center
continues descent down final stairway toward illuminated doorway

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow wet alley and descending the final stairs toward a building entrance

notable_agents.action: figure walking ahead in the distance through the alley

entered.detail: illuminated building entrance at the end of the stairway
small fixtures mounted on the alley walls providing dim illumination

segments.scene_description: The final segment traverses the deepest part of the narrow alley, with water streaming down the concrete path and red neon lights reflecting off wet surfaces. The camera follows a distant figure while descending the final stairs toward an illuminated doorway, completing the journey from the elevated highway overlook down to the lower city levels.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous descent from an elevated rooftop overlook into the depths of a rain-slicked urban alley. It begins on a narrow walkway with teal-green neon lighting, moving forward to reveal a distant highway overpass before turning left into a more enclosed commercial corridor. As the camera passes brightly lit vending machines and NPCs on benches, the scene shifts toward a darker, more atmospheric corridor lined with metal shutters and trash piles. The camera then descends a stairway past a group of NPCs, transitioning from the open heights into a narrow canyon of buildings bridged by an overhead walkway. Finally, the journey concludes in the deepest part of the alley, where red neon lights reflect off wet concrete and streaming water as the camera follows a distant figure toward an illuminated doorway.
